ACCOUNT_DELETE_SUCCESSFULL_MESSAGE: Please note that the deletion of your account will take effect in approximately 10 minutes. If you log in again during this time, the deletion was not successful and must be carried out again.

DISCLAIMER_TEXT: Disclamer: This service check is for informational purposes only and serves as a superficial assesment of your situation. Swiss Life Select or your financial Planner will not make any changes to your insurance provisions or investments solely based on the information provided.Please discuss all changes with your Financial Planner.If you have urgent modification needs.Please contact your Financial Planner immediately.

I_WOULD_LIKE_TO_PLAN_FOR_MY_CHILDRENS_FU: I would like to plan for my children's future.
I_WOULD_LIKE_TO_SECURE_MY_INCOME: I would like to secure my income.
I_WOULD_LIKE_TO_SECURE_THE_FUTURE_OF_MY_: I would like to secure the future of my dependents.
I_WOULD_LIKE_TO_SET_UP_A_PROVISION_SAVIN: I would like to set up a provision/saving plan.
NEW_HOBBY: New hobby, such as riding, diving, various extreme sports

QUESONE_FOOTERTEXT: For any further changes (bank details, new ID, etc.) please contract your Financial Planner directly.
QUESTION_TWO_DESC_TEXT: Please Select the relevant changes or add any additional ones:
QUES_FIVE_TITLE: I would like advice regarding the following topics (multiple choices possible):
QUES_FOUR_TITLE: Are you planning to make larger investments in the future (photovoltaic, outbuilding, bicycle, new hobby, drone, car purchase, musical instrument, apartment renovation, etc.)?
QUES_SIX_TITLE: Would you like to schedule an in-person or virtual consultation appoinment? If yes, your Financial Planner will contact you.
QUES_THREE_TITLE: Has your living situation changed in the last 12 months or are you planning to move soon?
QUES_TWO_TITLE: Has there been any change in your personal situation (marriage, children, career etc.)?

tns.brokerInfoDetails: Your dream property is one of the biggest private investments in your life. It is the center of life, the place where you write your own story, the place that offers security, satisfaction and home. I will accompany you on this journey. Regardless of whether you are currently considering buying a property, are already actively looking for it or already own your dream property. I will show you all your financial possibilities, compare financing offers from different banks and make sure that your dream of your own four walls is secure. You decide what is important to you, I support you with the implementation.

tns.disclaimerText: The "Investments" section in the Filip application should contain the investment instruments selected by the client, and any specific investment instruments or products (eg investment funds, bonds, etc.) and other data and information associated with them are for information only. When providing investment advisory services and / or arranging a specific investment order to a client Swiss Life Select Slovakia, a. s. , or its associates, are obliged to follow special internal regulations and procedures, in accordance with Swiss Life Select Slovakia, a. s. , further warns that due to market risk the value of investments in investment instruments may increase or decrease and the return on the invested amount is not guaranteed. Past performance is no guarantee of future performance.

tns.gdprConsentDescription: Please provide your consent for the following. You can proceed without giving consent for any of them. You will also be able to update your consent at any given time, this can be done from “My Account” area.
tns.gdprConsentElectronicDeliveryText: By registering in FiLiP you have also gained access to your electronic mailbox for electronic delivery.
tns.gdrpConsentCheckboxSubtitle1: Your data will be used to ask you questions regarding the quality of advice, services and products with the aim of increasing quality and adapting to current customer needs.
tns.gdrpConsentCheckboxSubtitle2: Your data will be used for the personal registration of your participation in, the planning and organisation of announced information events of the Swiss Life Select Advisory Centre and for this purpose to be contacted by telephone or e-mail and provided to the advisor of the nearest Swiss Life Select Advisory Centre (www.swisslife-select.at/beratungszentren) appointed by Swiss Life Select Österreich GmbH.
tns.gdrpConsentCheckboxSubtitle3: Your data will be used so that we can send you information about Swiss Life Select and our services and products on paper at your request.
tns.gdrpConsentCheckboxSubtitle4: Your data will be used for a personal registration for the delivery of our customer newsletter. In the newsletter you can unsubscribe in a few steps and thus revoke your consent without detours.
tns.gdrpConsentCheckboxSubtitle5: Other people from my household are allowed to see my personal data, contracts and documents in FiLiP.
tns.gdrpConsentCheckboxTitle1: Conducting market research and improving the services offered (customer satisfaction surveys, questions about products and services, etc.)
tns.gdrpConsentCheckboxTitle2: Invitation and implementation of customer events (such as local events, trade fairs, but also webinars and the like)
tns.gdrpConsentCheckboxTitle3: Processing for the postal of advertising information relating to products and services offered by Swiss Life Select
